prompt_text:
### Demographics: 59-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 11 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after hyperglycemia symptoms (polyuria, polydipsia, weight loss)
Current symptoms: Rare nocturnal hypoglycemia (1 episode in 3 months); no DKA/HHS signs; Intermittent GI discomfort (nausea/bloating)

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 3b (30-44)
ASCVD: Coronary artery disease (History of PCI/stent)
Body mass index category: Overweight
Diabetic neuropathy
Diabetic Peripheral Neuropathy
Pancreatic Cancer (post-treatment surveillance)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 3b (30-44); HF (No); ASCVD: Coronary artery disease (History of PCI/stent); MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Overweight
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (younger brother)
- Social history: Never smoker; Alcohol 5-6 drinks/week (1-2 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 500mg twice daily; Dulaglutide 1.5mg once weekly; Empagliflozin 10mg once daily; Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Losartan (50 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 78.7 kg; Height 178.9 cm; BMI 24.6 kg/m²; Blood pressure 113/78 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 8.4%; 9 months ago 8.1%; 6 months ago 7.6%; 3 months ago 7.4%; current 5.8%), FPG (12 months ago 231mg/dL; 9 months ago 204mg/dL; 6 months ago 204mg/dL; 3 months ago 158mg/dL; current 110mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 79.2kg; 9 months ago 75.7kg; 6 months ago 70.6kg; 3 months ago 70.8kg; current 78.7kg), Height (12 months ago 178.9cm; 9 months ago 178.9cm; 6 months ago 178.9cm; 3 months ago 178.9cm; current 178.9cm), BMI (12 months ago 25.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 24.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 22.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 22.0kg/m²; current 24.6kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 120mmHg; 9 months ago 120mmHg; 6 months ago 120mmHg; 3 months ago 120mmHg; current 113mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 80mmHg; 9 months ago 79mmHg; 6 months ago 78mmHg; 3 months ago 79mmHg; current 78mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 8U/L; 9 months ago 7U/L; 6 months ago 13U/L; 3 months ago 15U/L; current 12U/L), AST (12 months ago 24U/L; 9 months ago 30U/L; 6 months ago 23U/L; 3 months ago 20U/L; current 29U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.9mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.9mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.0mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.9mg/dL; current 1.0mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 40mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 39mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 41mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 41mL/min/1.73m²; current 39mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 405mg/g; 9 months ago 331mg/g; 6 months ago 474mg/g; 3 months ago 506mg/g; current 291mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 87mg/dL; 9 months ago 86mg/dL; 6 months ago 81mg/dL; 3 months ago 83mg/dL; current 84mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 53mg/dL; 9 months ago 54mg/dL; 6 months ago 56mg/dL; 3 months ago 57mg/dL; current 55mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 162mg/dL; 9 months ago 181mg/dL; 6 months ago 160mg/dL; 3 months ago 164mg/dL; current 171mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 13.0g/dL; 9 months ago 13.0g/dL; 6 months ago 12.2g/dL; 3 months ago 12.0g/dL; current 12.0g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Negative (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Excellent adherence (estimated ≥90%); SMBG 4-5 times/week; diet/exercise well controlled.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
